reasoning_content: We need to check if 7897 is prime. Quick sanity check: check divisibility by small primes. 7897 ends with 7, so not divisible by 2 or 5. Sum of digits: 7+8+9+7=31, not divisible by 3, so not divisible by 3. Check 7: 7*1128=7896, remainder 1, so not divisible by 7. Check 11: alternating sum: 7-8+9-7=1, not divisible by 11. Check 13: 13*607=7891, remainder 6. 13*608=7904, too high. So not 13. Check 17: 17*464=7888, remainder 9. 17*465=7905, too high. Check 19: 19*415=7885, remainder 12. 19*416=7904. Check 23: 23*343=7889, remainder 8. 23*344=7912. Check 29: 29*272=7888, remainder 9. 29*273=7917. Check 31: 31*254=7874, remainder 23. 31*255=7905. Check 37: 37*213=7881, remainder 16. 37*214=7918. Check 41: 41*192=7872, remainder 25. 41*193=7913. Check 43: 43*183=7869, remainder 28. 43*184=7912. Check 47: 47*168=7896, remainder 1. So not divisible by 47. Check 53: 53*149=7897? 53*149 = 53*150 - 53 = 7950-53=7897 exactly! Wait, 53*149 = 7897? Let's compute: 50*149=7450, 3*149=447, total 7897. Yes! So 7897 = 53 * 149. Thus it's composite. So quick sanity: not prime. Answer: composite.
